revisions.content: #REDIRECT [[University of Oxford]]

'''Lincoln College''' is the name of two separate educational establishments in the [[United Kingdom|UK]]: one is a constituent college of the [[University of Oxford]], the other is a [[further education]] college in [[Lincolnshire]]: 

* [[University of Oxford]]
* [[Lincoln College, Lincolnshire)]]
